method: 3 independent general-purpose sub-agent judges, name+description only, 20-query eval set (10 should-trigger / 10 should-not), majority vote

should_not_trigger.note: all 10 correctly NOT triggered by all 3 judges (0/30)

conclusion: Baseline description already at ceiling (100%) on an adversarial eval with keyword-overlapping near-misses. No failing cases exist to drive description improvement, so the improve-loop has nothing to optimize against. Recommend keeping the current description as-is.
